name: io.github.coe0718/deskbrid
description: Multi-DE Linux desktop automation for AI agents. 92+ MCP tools across 9 desktop environments — window management, keyboard/mouse input, screenshots, clipboard, system info, accessibility tree, printing, and more. GNOME, KDE, Hyprland, COSMIC, Sway, Niri, Wayfire, Labwc, Cinnamon, MATE, X11.
